calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mary I Billedo is present.
Michael Carillo Hall appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Marjorie S De La Cruz is present.
JR Gabbard representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 46 Laura Street, San Francisco, CA 94112.

This case settled, the trial date of September 10, 2007 is vacated.

Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: ATTORNEY MICHAEL HALL (415.512.9865) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MARJORIE DELA CRUZ (415.374.5136) DEFENDANT IN PRO PER APPEARING ON HER OWN BEHALF.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT MARJORIE DE LA CRUZ'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is DENIED. DEFENDANT SHALL RESPOND TO COMPLAINT WITHIN FIVE DAYS. Plaintiff has shown proof of valid service. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)
